title: openclaw/openclaw
content: Your own personal AI assistant. Any OS. Any Platform. The lobster way. 🦞
summary: OpenClaw 是一个跨平台、跨操作系统的个人AI助手项目，以龙虾方式运行。
highlights: Your own personal AI assistant
Any OS. Any Platform
The lobster way

title: obra/superpowers
content: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.
summary: Superpowers 是一个代理技能框架和软件开发方法论，旨在提升开发效率与协作能力。
highlights: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.

title: affaan-m/ECC
content: The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.
summary: 一个针对Claude Code、Codex、Opencode、Cursor等AI编码代理的性能优化系统，涵盖技能、本能、记忆、安全及研究优先的开发方法。
highlights: The agent harness performance optimization system.
Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.

title: n8n-io/n8n
content: Fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities. Combine visual building with custom code, self-host or cloud, 400+ integrations.
summary: n8n是一个公平代码的工作流自动化平台，具备原生AI能力，支持可视化构建与自定义代码结合，可自托管或使用云服务，拥有400多个集成。
highlights: Fair-code workflow automation platform with native AI capabilities
Combine visual building with custom code
self-host or cloud
400+ integrations

title: Significant-Gravitas/AutoGPT
content: AutoGPT is the vision of accessible AI for everyone, to use and to build on. Our mission is to provide the tools, so that you can focus on what matters.
summary: AutoGPT 致力于让每个人都能访问和使用 AI，提供工具以帮助用户专注于重要事务。
highlights: AutoGPT is the vision of accessible AI for everyone
Our mission is to provide the tools, so that you can focus on what matters

title: ollama/ollama
content: Get up and running with Kimi-K2.5, GLM-5, MiniMax, DeepSeek, gpt-oss, Qwen, Gemma and other models.
summary: Ollama 是一个开源项目，支持快速运行多种大型语言模型，包括 Kimi-K2.5、GLM-5、MiniMax、DeepSeek、gpt-oss、Qwen、Gemma 等。
highlights: Get up and running with Kimi-K2.5, GLM-5, MiniMax, DeepSeek, gpt-oss, Qwen, Gemma and other models.
支持多种主流大语言模型的一键运行

title: NousResearch/hermes-agent
content: The agent that grows with you
summary: NousResearch/hermes-agent 是一个能够随用户成长而进化的智能代理项目。
highlights: The agent that grows with you

title: anomalyco/opencode
summary: OpenCode 是一个开源的编码代理项目，旨在提供自动化的代码生成和辅助编程功能。
highlights: The open source coding agent.

title: AUTOMATIC1111/stable-diffusion-webui
summary: AUTOMATIC1111/stable-diffusion-webui 是一个基于 Gradio 库的 Stable Diffusion 网页界面，提供图像生成、编辑等功能，支持多种模型和扩展。
highlights: 提供直观的网页界面，方便用户使用 Stable Diffusion 模型生成图像。
支持多种模型、采样方法和扩展，功能丰富。
开源项目，社区活跃，持续更新。

title: f/prompts.chat
content: f.k.a. Awesome ChatGPT Prompts. Share, discover, and collect prompts from the community. Free and open source — self-host for your organization with complete privacy.
summary: f/prompts.chat 是一个开源项目，原名 Awesome ChatGPT Prompts，旨在让社区分享、发现和收集 ChatGPT 提示词，支持自托管以保护隐私。
highlights: Share, discover, and collect prompts from the community.
Free and open source — self-host for your organization with complete privacy.

title: Intent to Prototype: Embedding API
summary: Chromium 团队提出 Embedding API 的原型意图，旨在提供一种标准化的嵌入内容方式，相关讨论已在 Lobsters 上展开。
highlights: Intent to Prototype: Embedding API
Comments on Lobsters

title: Encyclical Letter of His Holiness Leo XIV Magnifica Humanitas
summary: 教皇利奥十四世发布通谕《Magnifica Humanitas》，探讨人性尊严与当代伦理议题。
highlights: Encyclical Letter of His Holiness Leo XIV Magnifica Humanitas

title: Strengthening societal resilience with Rosalind Biodefense
content: OpenAI launches Rosalind Biodefense, expanding trusted access to GPT-Rosalind for vetted developers and U.S. government partners advancing biodefense, public health, and pandemic preparedness through frontier AI.
summary: OpenAI 推出 Rosalind Biodefense，为经过审查的开发者和美国政府合作伙伴提供 GPT-Rosalind 的信任访问，以通过前沿 AI 推进生物防御、公共卫生和大流行病防范。
highlights: OpenAI launches Rosalind Biodefense
expanding trusted access to GPT-Rosalind
for vetted developers and U.S. government partners
advancing biodefense, public health, and pandemic preparedness through frontier AI

title: How Endava builds an agentic organization with Codex
content: Learn how Endava uses Codex to build an agentic organization, accelerating software delivery and reducing requirements analysis from weeks to hours.
summary: Endava利用OpenAI Codex构建代理型组织，将需求分析从数周缩短至数小时，加速软件交付。
highlights: accelerating software delivery
reducing requirements analysis from weeks to hours

title: Profiling in PyTorch (Part 1): A Beginner's Guide to torch.profiler
summary: 本文是PyTorch性能分析系列的第一部分，面向初学者介绍torch.profiler的基本用法，包括如何记录操作、查看时间消耗和内存使用，以及如何利用其可视化功能优化模型性能。
highlights: torch.profiler 是 PyTorch 内置的性能分析工具，用于测量和记录模型运行时的操作耗时。
通过 profiler.record_function 可以自定义代码块的分析范围。
使用 profiler.export_chrome_trace 可以生成 Chrome 浏览器可查看的可视化跟踪文件。

title: ITBench-AA: Frontier Models Score Below 50% on the First Benchmark for Agentic Enterprise IT Tasks — by Artificial Analysis and IBM
summary: ITBench-AA是首个针对企业IT任务的代理基准测试，由Artificial Analysis和IBM联合发布。测试结果显示，前沿模型在该基准上的得分低于50%，表明当前AI代理在企业IT场景中的表现仍有显著提升空间。
highlights: ITBench-AA is the first benchmark for agentic enterprise IT tasks.
Frontier models score below 50% on this benchmark.
The benchmark was developed by Artificial Analysis and IBM.
